name: LinkRelay Repo
subtitle: Official Repository for LinkRelay
description: Dedicated repository for LinkRelay. Sideload the latest version of LinkRelay for LiveContainer, SideStore, and AltStore.

apps.name: LinkRelay
apps.subtitle: Relay links to designated containers
apps.localizedDescription: LinkRelay is a utility application designed to relay links and coordinate URL schemes smoothly inside containerized environments like LiveContainer.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial release of LinkRelay. Supports URL scheme relaying and integration with LiveContainer.

news.title: LinkRelay Repository Online
news.caption: Get the latest official releases of LinkRelay directly from this source.
